sentence: Kirkfuse the crowd before your testicule finds the podium.

wombos.definition: Something so objectively bad that it stands as a testament to failure and deserves to be ridiculed. A clear-cut example of awfulness. Used as a noun: 'that take is a testicule.'
To confuse someone in a distinctly Kirk-coded way — calmly, articulately, and with podium-level confidence. They walk away unsure what just happened.
wombos.example: He didn't argue with her, he just kirkfused her until she changed the subject.
